\tzpentry{ID3796}{Wavefunction Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3796 introduces Wavefunction Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \nabla^2\psi+k^2\psi=0 \end{equation}
